title: csv-export — dump a table to CSV (in-memory)
body: Read the entire result set into a list, then join each row with commas and join rows with newlines. No quoting or escaping. Returns one big string.
completeness: partial — no streaming (buffers the whole table), no header row
correctness: defective — a field containing a comma, quote, or newline corrupts the row (no RFC-4180 quoting)
